Details: Removed the deprecated archived_at attribute from `Event`. Renamed details attribute on `Event` to summary. Removed percent_approved from `EventResourceRequest`. Renamed room_setup_info attribute on `EventResourceRequest` to notes.

Resources.Name: Attachment
Resources.Description: An uploaded file attached to an event.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the attachment

Attributes.Name: content_type
Attributes.Description: MIME type of the attachment

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the attachment was created

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: Description of the attachment

Attributes.Name: file_size
Attributes.Description: File size in bytes

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Set to the file name if not provided

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the attachment was updated

Attributes.Name: url
Attributes.Description: Path to where the attachment is stored

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-content_type) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-description) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-file_size) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Conflict
Resources.Description:
A conflict between two events caused by overlapping event resource
requests.

If the conflict has been resolved, `resolved_at` will be present.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the conflict

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the conflict was created

Attributes.Name: note
Attributes.Description: Additional information about the conflict or resolution

Attributes.Name: resolved_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the conflict was resolved

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the conflict was updated

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-resolved_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ContainingResource
Resources.Description:
The containing record for a RoomSetup. Can be a Resource or
an Organization

Resources.Name: Event
Resources.Description:
An event.

May contain information such as who owns
the event, visibility on Church Center and a public-facing summary.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the event

Attributes.Name: approval_status
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `A`: approved.
- `P`: pending.
- `R`: rejected.

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event was created

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: A rich text public-facing summary of the event

Attributes.Name: image_url
Attributes.Description: Path to where the event image is stored

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the event

Attributes.Name: percent_approved
Attributes.Description:
Calculated by taking the sum of the `percent_approved` for all
future `ReservationBlocks` and dividing that by the `count` of all future
`ReservationBlocks`.

If there are no future `ReservationBlocks`, returns `100`

Attributes.Name: percent_rejected
Attributes.Description:
Calculated by taking the sum of the `percent_rejected` for all
future `ReservationBlocks` and dividing that by the `count` of all future
`ReservationBlocks`.

If there are no future `ReservationBlocks`, returns `0`

Attributes.Name: registration_url
Attributes.Description: The registration URL for the event

Attributes.Name: summary
Attributes.Description: A plain text public-facing summary of the event

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event was updated

Attributes.Name: visible_in_church_center
Attributes.Description:
- `true` indicates the event Church Center visibility is set to 'Published'
- `false` indicates the event Church Center visibility is set to 'Hidden'

Resources.Name: EventConnection
Resources.Description: A connection between a Calendar event and a record in another product

Attributes.Name: connected_to_id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the connected record

Attributes.Name: connected_to_name
Attributes.Description: Name of the record that the event is connected to

Attributes.Name: connected_to_type
Attributes.Description: Currently we support `signup`, `group`, `event`, and `service_type`

Attributes.Name: product_name
Attributes.Description: Currently we support `registrations`, `groups`, `check-ins`, and `services`

Attributes.Name: connected_to_url
Attributes.Description: A link to the connected record

Attributes.Name: promoted
Attributes.Description:
Whether this connection is promoted for display (only applies to Groups connections)

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Resources.Name: EventInstance
Resources.Description:
A specific occurrence of an event.

If the event is recurring, `recurrence` will be set and
`recurrence_description` will provide an overview of the recurrence pattern.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the event instance

Attributes.Name: all_day_event
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether event instance lasts all day

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event instance was created

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description:
A rich text public-facing summary of the event

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: ends_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event instance ends

Attributes.Name: image_url
Attributes.Description:
Path to where the event image is stored

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: location
Attributes.Description: Representation of where the event instance takes place

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of event. Can be overridden for specific instances

Attributes.Name: recurrence
Attributes.Description: For a recurring event instance, the interval of how often the event instance occurs

Attributes.Name: recurrence_description
Attributes.Description: Longer description of the event instance's recurrence pattern

Attributes.Name: starts_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event instance starts

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event instance was updated

Attributes.Name: church_center_url
Attributes.Description: The URL for the event on Church Center

Attributes.Name: published_starts_at
Attributes.Description: Publicly visible start time

Attributes.Name: published_ends_at
Attributes.Description: Publicly visible end time

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-ends_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-starts_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: EventResourceAnswer
Resources.Description: An answer to a question in a room or resource request.

Attributes.Name: answer
Attributes.Description: The answer formatted for display

Attributes.Name: db_answer
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: question
Attributes.Description: Question details as of when it was answered

Resources.Name: EventResourceRequest
Resources.Description: A room or resource request for a specific event.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the request

Attributes.Name: approval_sent
Attributes.Description: Whether or not an email has been sent to request approval

Attributes.Name: approval_status
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `A`: approved
- `P`: pending
- `R`: rejected

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which request was created

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which request was updated

Attributes.Name: notes
Attributes.Description: Additional information about the room or resource request

Attributes.Name: quantity
Attributes.Description: How many of the rooms or resources are being requested

Attributes.Name: visible_on_kiosks
Attributes.Description: Whether this resource request is visible on kiosks

Resources.Name: EventTime
Resources.Description:
Start and end times for each event instance.

In the Calendar UI, these are represented under the "Schedule" section and
may include "Setup" and "Teardown" times for the instance.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the event time

Attributes.Name: ends_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event time ends

Attributes.Name: starts_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the event time starts

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the event time

Attributes.Name: visible_on_kiosks
Attributes.Description: Set to `true` if the time is visible on kiosk

Attributes.Name: visible_on_widget_and_ical
Attributes.Description: Set to `true` if the time is visible on widget or iCal

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-ends_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-starts_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Feed
Resources.Description: A feed belonging to an organization.

Attributes.Name: default_church_center_visibility
Attributes.Description: Possible values: `hidden` or `published`

Attributes.Name: feed_type
Attributes.Description: Possible values: `registrations`, `groups`, `ical`, or `form`

Attributes.Name: sync_campus_tags
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order

CanQueryBy.Name: feed_type
CanQueryBy.Description:
Query on a specific feed_type

Possible values: `registrations`, `groups`, `ical`, or `form`

Resources.Name: Organization
Resources.Description:
An administrative structure, usually representing a single church.
Contains date/time formatting and time zone preferences.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the organization

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the organization

Attributes.Name: time_zone
Attributes.Description: The time zone of the organization

Attributes.Name: twenty_four_hour_time
Attributes.Description:
- `true` indicates hours for times will use a 24-hour clock
- `false` indicates hours for times will use a 12-hour clock

Attributes.Name: date_format
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `%d/%m/%Y`: indicates date/month/year formatting
- `%m/%d/%Y`: indicates month/date/year formatting

Attributes.Name: onboarding
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: calendar_starts_on
Attributes.Description: The day of the week the calendar starts on

Resources.Name: Person
Resources.Description: The people in your organization with access to Calendar.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the person

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the person was created

Attributes.Name: first_name
Attributes.Description: The person's first name

Attributes.Name: last_name
Attributes.Description: The person's last name

Attributes.Name: middle_name
Attributes.Description: The person's middle name

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the person was updated

Attributes.Name: avatar_url
Attributes.Description: Path to where the avatar image is stored

Attributes.Name: child
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person is a child

Attributes.Name: contact_data
Attributes.Description:
An object containing the person's contact data.

This can include an array of `email_addresses`, `addresses` and `phone_numbers`

Attributes.Name: gender
Attributes.Description: `M` indicates male, `F` indicates female

Attributes.Name: has_access
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person has access to Calendar

Attributes.Name: name_prefix
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `Mr.`
- `Mrs.`
- `Ms.`
- `Miss`
- `Dr.`
- `Rev.`

Attributes.Name: name_suffix
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `Jr.`
- `Sr.`
- `Ph.D.`
- `II`
- `III`

Attributes.Name: pending_request_count
Attributes.Description:
If the person is a member of an approval group, the number of EventResourceRequests needing resolution.

If `resolves_conflicts` is `true`, the count will also include the number of Conflicts needing resolution.

Attributes.Name: permissions
Attributes.Description: Integer that corresponds to the person's permissions in Calendar

Attributes.Name: resolves_conflicts
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person is able to resolve Conflicts

Attributes.Name: site_administrator
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person is a Organization Administrator

Attributes.Name: status
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `active`: The person is marked "active" in People
- `inactive`: The person is marked "inactive" in People


Possible values: `active`, `pending`, or `inactive`

Attributes.Name: can_edit_people
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person can edit other people

Attributes.Name: can_edit_resources
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person can edit resources

Attributes.Name: can_edit_rooms
Attributes.Description: Indicates whether the person can edit rooms

Attributes.Name: event_permissions_type
Attributes.Description: Event permissions for the person

Attributes.Name: member_of_approval_groups
Attributes.Description:
Indicates whether the person is a member of at least one approval group

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The person's first name, last name, and name suffix

Attributes.Name: people_permissions_type
Attributes.Description: People permissions for the person

Attributes.Name: room_permissions_type
Attributes.Description: Room permissions for the person

Attributes.Name: resources_permissions_type
Attributes.Description: Resource permissions for the person

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-first_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-last_name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-resolves_conflicts) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ReportTemplate
Resources.Description: A template for generating a report.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the report

Attributes.Name: body
Attributes.Description: The contents of the report template

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the report was created

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: A summarization of the report

Attributes.Name: title
Attributes.Description: The title of the report

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the report was updated

Resources.Name: RequiredApproval
Resources.Description: Represents the relationship between a Resource and a Resource Approval Group.

Resources.Name: Resource
Resources.Description:
A room or resource that can be requested for use as part of
an event.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the room or resource

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the room or resource was created

Attributes.Name: kind
Attributes.Description: The type of resource, can either be `Room` or `Resource`

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the room or resource

Attributes.Name: serial_number
Attributes.Description: The serial number of the resource

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the room or resource was updated

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: Description of the room or resource

Attributes.Name: expires_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the resource expires

Attributes.Name: home_location
Attributes.Description: Where the resource is normally kept

Attributes.Name: image
Attributes.Description: Path to where resource image is stored

Attributes.Name: quantity
Attributes.Description: The quantity of the resource

Attributes.Name: path_name
Attributes.Description:
A string representing the location of the resource if it is nested within a folder.

Each parent folder is separated by `/`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-expires_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ResourceApprovalGroup
Resources.Description:
A group of people that can be attached to a room or resource
in order to require their approval for booking.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the approval group

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the approval group was created

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: Name of the approval group

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the approval group was updated

Attributes.Name: form_count
Attributes.Description: Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: resource_count
Attributes.Description:
The number of resources in the approval group

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

Attributes.Name: room_count
Attributes.Description:
The number of rooms in the approval group

Only available when requested with the `?fields` param

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ResourceBooking
Resources.Description: A specific booking of a room or resource for an event instance.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the booking

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the booking was created

Attributes.Name: ends_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which usage of the booked room or resource ends

Attributes.Name: starts_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which usage of the booked room or resource starts

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the booking was updated

Attributes.Name: quantity
Attributes.Description: The quantity of the rooms or resources booked

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-ends_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-starts_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ResourceFolder
Resources.Description: An organizational folder containing rooms or resources.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the folder

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the folder was created

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The folder name

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the folder was updated

Attributes.Name: kind
Attributes.Description: The type of folder, can either be `Room` or `Resource`

Attributes.Name: path_name
Attributes.Description:
A string representing the location of the folder if it is nested.

Each parent folder is separated by `/`

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-ancestry) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: ResourceQuestion
Resources.Description: A question to answer when requesting to book a room or resource.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the question

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the question was created

Attributes.Name: kind
Attributes.Description:
Possible values:
- `dropdown`: predefined list of choices as an answer
- `paragraph`: expected answer is a paragraph
- `text`: expected answer is a sentence
- `yesno`: expected answer is 'Yes' or 'No'

- `section_header`: used to separate questions in the UI, no expected answer

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the question was updated

Attributes.Name: choices
Attributes.Description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`, represents a string of dropdown choices
separated by the `|` character

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: Optional description of the question

Attributes.Name: multiple_select
Attributes.Description:
If `kind` is `dropdown`,
`true` indicates that more than one selection is permitted

Attributes.Name: optional
Attributes.Description:
- `true` indicates answering the question is not required when booking
- `false` indicates answering the question is required when booking

Attributes.Name: position
Attributes.Description: Position of question in list in the UI

Attributes.Name: question
Attributes.Description: The question to be answered

Resources.Name: ResourceSuggestion
Resources.Description: A resource and quantity suggested by a room setup.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the suggestion

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the suggestion was created

Attributes.Name: quantity
Attributes.Description: How many resources should be requested

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the suggestion was updated

Resources.Name: RoomSetup
Resources.Description: A diagram and list of suggested resources useful for predefined room setups.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the room setup

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the room setup was created

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the room setup

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the room setup was updated

Attributes.Name: description
Attributes.Description: A description of the room setup

Attributes.Name: diagram
Attributes.Description:
An object containing `url` and `thumbnail`.

`url` is path to where room setup is stored.
`thumbnail` contains `url` path to where thumbnail is stored.

Attributes.Name: diagram_url
Attributes.Description: Path to where room setup is stored

Attributes.Name: diagram_thumbnail_url
Attributes.Description: Path to where thumbnail version of room setup is stored

Relationships.Name: room_setup
Relationships.Note: The shared room setup this is linked to

Relationships.Name: resource_suggestions
Relationships.Note: A list of suggested resources for this room setup

Relationships.Name: containing_resource
Relationships.Note: The resource this room setup is attached to

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-created_at) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-updated_at) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: Tag
Resources.Description:
An organizational tag that can be applied to events.

Applied tags can be used to filter events on the calendar or
filter events for reports, iCal feeds, kiosk, and the widget.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the tag

Attributes.Name: church_center_category
Attributes.Description: `true` indicates that this tag is used as a category on Church Center

Attributes.Name: color
Attributes.Description: Hex color code of the tag

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the tag was created

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The tag name

Attributes.Name: position
Attributes.Description:
If the tag belongs to a TagGroup,
position indicates place in list within TagGroup in the UI.

If the tag does not belong to a TagGroup,
position indicates place in list under "Individual Tags" in the UI.

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the tag was updated

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
prefix with a hyphen (-position) to reverse the order

Resources.Name: TagGroup
Resources.Description: A grouping of tags for organizational purposes.

Attributes.Name: id
Attributes.Description: Unique identifier for the tag group

Attributes.Name: created_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the tag group was created

Attributes.Name: name
Attributes.Description: The name of the tag group

Attributes.Name: updated_at
Attributes.Description: UTC time at which the tag group was updated

Attributes.Name: required
Attributes.Description: - `true` indicates tag from this tag group must be applied when creating an event

CanOrderBy.Description: prefix with a hyphen (-name) to reverse the order
